---
title: "Kenneth, or, The Rear Guard of the Grand Army. By the author of  “Scenes and Characters,” “Kings of England,” etc."
---

## Kenneth, or, The Rear Guard of the Grand Army. By the author of  “Scenes and Characters,” “Kings of England,” etc.

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1850
**Genre:** Fiction (historical)
**Format:** Book

**Publisher:** John Henry Parker, Oxford and London.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
